extortion.description: The Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi (IIIT-Delhi) is a prestigious academic and research institution located in New Delhi, India. Established in 2008, it specializes in Information Technology and allied areas, offering undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs. IIIT-Delhi is known for its cutting-edge research, state-of-the-art facilities, and strong industry collaborations, fostering innovation and excellence in technology education.
